welcome.title: 👋 Welcome to BIAgent — Business Intelligence Assistant
welcome.description: I provide real-time business data from your CRM, ERP, and Inventory systems. Ask me anything in English or Hebrew.
welcome.prompt: What would you like to know today?

error.generic: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
error.no_data: No data found for your request. Please check the query parameters and try again.
error.permission_denied: Access denied. You do not have permission to view this data. Please contact your administrator to request the appropriate role.
error.timeout: The request timed out. The data system may be under load. Please try again in 30 seconds.
error.system_unavailable: The data system is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or contact IT support.

pipeline.title: 📊 Sales Pipeline
